title: Angry Birds: Action!
short_description: 3D Angry Birds pinball-style tie-in to The Angry Birds Movie — slingshot the flock through movie-inspired tables (iOS & Android).
description: Angry Birds: Action! is the first full 3D entry into the Angry Birds franchise. Also the first game set in The Angry Birds: Movie universe, it features gameplay inspired by pinball games and air hockey. Players need to launch Angry Birds characters in pinball-like tables using the familiar slingshot mechanics. They then ping around the 3D environments trying to save the eggs for the pigs.
